dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes waiting for technical confirmation before entering with trend. Interpreted as: (1) price movement in intended direction (close above/below open for direction confirmation), and (2) at least one primary indicator confirms (price above/below SMA_20 as primary trend confirmation). Exit when confirming indicator reverses (price closes back through SMA_20). Used SMA_20 as accessible trend-following indicator. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal handles both long and short scenarios with same logic. Target regimes limited to TRENDING as signal specifies trend-confirmation methodology.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes waiting for technical confirmation before entering with trend. Interpreted as: (1) price movement in intended direction (close above/below open for direction confirmation), and (2) at least one primary indicator confirms (price above/below SMA_20 as primary trend confirmation). Exit when confirming indicator reverses (price closes back through SMA_20). Used SMA_20 as accessible trend-following indicator. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal handles both long and short scenarios with same logic. Target regimes limited to TRENDING as signal specifies trend-confirmation methodology.

source_rule_text: A trader should wait for technical indicators to confirm trend direction before entering, rather than entering impulsively based on market movement alone, to avoid losses from premature entry.
